info.title: Gemini AI
info.description: API reference for Gemini AI on Ace Data Cloud.

id.description: A unique identifier for the chat completion.

model.description: The model used for the chat completion.

object.description: The object type, which is always `chat.completion`.

index.description: The index of the choice in the list of choices.

role.description: The role of the author of this message.

id.description: The ID of the tool call.

type.description: The type of the tool call. Currently, only `function` is supported.

name.description: The name of the function to call.

arguments.description: The arguments to call the function with, as generated by the model in JSON format.

function.description: The function that the model called.

tool_calls.description: The tool calls generated by the model, such as function calls.

refusal.description: The refusal message generated by the model.

message.description: A chat completion message generated by the model.

finish_reason.description:
The reason the model stopped generating tokens. This will be `stop` if the model hit a natural stop point or a provided stop sequence,
`length` if the maximum number of tokens specified in the request was reached,
`content_filter` if content was omitted due to a flag from our content filters,
`tool_calls` if the model called a tool, or `function_call` (deprecated) if the model called a function.

logprobs.description: Log probability information for the choice.

choices.description: A list of chat completion choices. Can be more than one if `n` is greater than 1.

created.description: The Unix timestamp (in seconds) of when the chat completion was created.

system_fingerprint.description:
This fingerprint represents the backend configuration that the model runs with.

Can be used in conjunction with the `seed` request parameter to understand when backend changes have been made that might impact determinism.

prompt_tokens.description: Number of tokens in the prompt.

completion_tokens.description: Number of tokens in the generated completion.

total_tokens.description: Total number of tokens used in the request (prompt + completion).

usage.description: Usage statistics for the completion request.

schema.description: Represents a chat completion response returned by model, based on the provided input.

error.message: The specified token is not matched with API.

message.example: The specified token is not matched with API.

trace_id.description: The trace id of this request.
The trace id of this request.

400.description: Bad request, possibly due to missing or invalid parameters.

error.message: The specified token is invalid or wrong.

message.example: The specified token is invalid or wrong.

trace_id.description: The trace id of this request.

401.description: Unauthorized, invalid or missing authorization token.

error.message: You have exceeded the rate limit.

message.example: You have exceeded the rate limit.

trace_id.description: The trace id of this request.

429.description: Too many requests, you have exceeded the rate limit.

trace_id.description: The trace id of this request.

500.description: Internal server error, something went wrong on the server.

parameters.name: accept
parameters.description: Specifies the format of the response from the server.

n.description: How many chat completion choices to generate for each input message.

model.description: ID of the model to use.

stream.description: If set, partial message deltas will be sent, like in ChatGPT.

oneOf.description: The text contents of the message.

type.description: The type of the content part.
The type of the content part.

url.description: Either a URL of the image or the base64 encoded image data.

detail.description: Specifies the detail level of the image.

image_url.description: The image URL or base64 encoded image data.

oneOf.description: An array of content parts with a defined type. Can contain text and image_url inputs.

content.description: The contents of the message. Can be a string for text-only messages, or an array of content parts for multimodal messages (text and image_url).

name.description: An optional name for the participant. Provides the model information to differentiate between participants of the same role.

messages.description: A list of messages comprising the conversation so far.

max_tokens.description: The maximum number of tokens that can be generated in the chat completion.

temperature.description: What sampling temperature to use, between 0 and 2. Higher values like 0.8 will make the output more random, while lower values like 0.2 will make it more focused and deterministic.

response_format.description: An object specifying the format that the model must output. If not specified, the model will output text.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The model to use for content generation. Format: model name (without `models/` prefix).

contents.description: The content of the current conversation with the model. For single-turn queries, this is a single instance. For multi-turn queries (chat), this is a repeated field that contains conversation history and the latest request.

role.description: The role of the content producer. Must be 'user' or 'model'.

parts.description: Ordered parts that constitute a single message.

mimeType.description: The IANA standard MIME type of the source data.

functionCall.description: A predicted FunctionCall returned from the model.

functionResponse.description: The result output of a FunctionCall.

generationConfig.description: Configuration options for model generation and outputs.

stopSequences.description: Character sequences that will stop output generation (up to 5).

responseMimeType.description: MIME type of the generated candidate text. Supported: text/plain, application/json, text/x.enum.

responseSchema.description: Output schema for generated candidate text (OpenAPI schema subset). Used with application/json responseMimeType.

responseModalities.description: Set of response modalities the model can return.

candidateCount.description: Number of generated responses to return.

maxOutputTokens.description: Maximum number of tokens in the response.

temperature.description: Controls randomness of the output. Range: [0.0, 2.0].

topP.description: Maximum cumulative probability of tokens to consider when sampling.

topK.description: Maximum number of tokens to consider when sampling.

presencePenalty.description: Presence penalty applied to tokens already in the response.

frequencyPenalty.description: Frequency penalty applied proportionally to token usage count.

thinkingConfig.description: Configuration for thinking features (supported models only).

includeThoughts.description: Whether to include thoughts in the response.

thinkingBudget.description: Number of thought tokens the model should generate.

tools.description: A list of Tools the model may use to generate the next response.

codeExecution.description: Tool that executes code generated by the model.

safetySettings.description: Safety settings to block unsafe content.

cachedContent.description: The name of the cached content to use. Format: cachedContents/{cachedContent}

thought.description: Whether this part is a thinking/reasoning step.

post.description: Generates a streamed response from the model given an input GenerateContentRequest. Use query parameter `alt=sse` for server-sent events streaming.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The model to use for content generation.

parameters.name: alt
parameters.description: Set to 'sse' for server-sent events streaming format.

contents.description: The content of the current conversation with the model. For single-turn queries, this is a single instance. For multi-turn queries (chat), this is a repeated field that contains conversation history and the latest request.

role.description: The role of the content producer. Must be 'user' or 'model'.

parts.description: Ordered parts that constitute a single message.

functionResponse.description: The result output of a FunctionCall.

generationConfig.description: Configuration options for model generation and outputs.

responseMimeType.description: MIME type of the generated candidate text. Supported: text/plain, application/json, text/x.enum.

responseSchema.description: Output schema for generated candidate text (OpenAPI schema subset). Used with application/json responseMimeType.

responseModalities.description: Set of response modalities the model can return.

candidateCount.description: Number of generated responses to return.

maxOutputTokens.description: Maximum number of tokens in the response.

temperature.description: Controls randomness of the output. Range: [0.0, 2.0].

topP.description: Maximum cumulative probability of tokens to consider when sampling.

topK.description: Maximum number of tokens to consider when sampling.

presencePenalty.description: Presence penalty applied to tokens already in the response.

frequencyPenalty.description: Frequency penalty applied proportionally to token usage count.

thinkingConfig.description: Configuration for thinking features (supported models only).

includeThoughts.description: Whether to include thoughts in the response.

thinkingBudget.description: Number of thought tokens the model should generate.

tools.description: A list of Tools the model may use to generate the next response.

codeExecution.description: Tool that executes code generated by the model.

safetySettings.description: Safety settings to block unsafe content.

cachedContent.description: The name of the cached content to use. Format: cachedContents/{cachedContent}

thought.description: Whether this part is a thinking/reasoning step.
